Strategy meets
the classics

Line up five in a row — horizontal, vertical, or diagonal — before your opponents do. Outwit them with Jacks, block their plans, and claim the board.

HOW TO PLAY
🎯 OBJECTIVE

Be the first team to complete the required number of Sequences. A Sequence is 5 chips in a row — horizontal, vertical, or diagonal.

🃏 PLAYING A CARD

Each turn, select a card from your hand then tap the matching cell on the board to place your chip there.

→
→
YOUR CARD MATCH ON BOARD CHIP PLACED
✨ SEQUENCES

5 of your chips in a row in any direction. The 4 corner spaces are wild — they count for all teams.

🃏 TWO-EYED JACK WILD

A Two-Eyed Jack lets you place your chip on any empty cell on the board — regardless of the card value.

→

Any empty cell!

🗡️ ONE-EYED JACK REMOVE

A One-Eyed Jack lets you remove any opponent's chip from the board — but not chips that are part of a completed Sequence.

→
♻️ DEAD CARDS

If both board cells matching your card are already occupied, your card is dead. Tap it to select it — a Discard button will appear. Discard it to draw a new card.

WELCOME TO SEQUENCE!

A strategic card & chip game for 2–12 players. Easy to learn, hard to master.

Be the first team to complete Sequences to win!

🃏
PLAY A CARD

Tap a card in your hand to select it. Then tap the matching cell on the board to place your chip.

Your hand
→
Board cell
→
Chip placed!
✨
MAKE A SEQUENCE

Get 5 chips in a row — horizontal, vertical, or diagonal. That's a Sequence!

Corner spaces are wild — they count for everyone!

THE POWER OF JACKS
Two-Eyed Jack
♦ Diamonds · ♣ Clubs

Place a chip on any empty cell

One-Eyed Jack
♠ Spades · ♥ Hearts

Remove any opponent's chip

💡 Save your Jacks — only use them when it really counts
💡 Corner spaces give you a free chip in any sequence
